description_long: This is a rugged, military-green all-terrain van with a boxy body and oversized, deeply treaded tires designed for extreme off-road conditions. The vehicle features a matte, dark green exterior with minimal ornamentation, large rectangular side windows, and a slightly sloped front windshield. The front end is simple, with two round headlights, a small grille, and a license plate mounted below the bumper. The rear has two square windows, red tail lights, and another license plate, indicating road legality. The tires are exceptionally large and knobby, providing high ground clearance and superior traction on rough surfaces. The overall design suggests durability and functionality, suitable for traversing urban obstacles or rugged environments.
description: A boxy, military-green all-terrain van with oversized, knobby tires and large windows, built for extreme off-road use. Its rugged design and high ground clearance make it ideal for urban and rough terrain.
description_view_0: Side view showing the elongated body, three large windows, and two massive, knobby tires.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the rounded windshield, two round headlights, and the wide stance of the oversized tires.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring the first side with similar window and tire arrangement.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying two square windows, red tail lights, and a rear license plate.
attribute_tire_tread_pattern: The tires have a knobby, blocky tread pattern with deep grooves, optimized for all-terrain and off-road traction.
